title: Yasuie’s Execution Shakes Wano
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Yasuie, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Orochi, Ebisu Town Citizens as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: Yasuie’s execution exposes Orochi’s cruelty and the tragedy of the SMILE victims in Ebisu Town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right, everyone! laugh! Smile! Send him off with cheer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Such is Wano! Bright, mindful Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You could almost confuse it for heaven!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieeeeeeeeeeeeeee!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was such a fool to have not known it was you until you were crucified... I would offer my life to you in seppuku.

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Damn it! They got Toho- Yasuie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We didn't make it in time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Some- thing's definitely wrong here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: whereze whereze

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: The people of ebisu, his beloved friends...

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieieeeeee!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: HAA... HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: UDon, Prisoner's mine

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Look! They've lost their minds!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They laugh as their former Daimyo is executed before their eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: You're a cruel one, Orochi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: LORD YASUE... I HAD NO IDEA YOU WERE STILL ALIVE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They've obviously got a reason.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: doesn't matter who that guy was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's no one out there

dialogue.speaker: Ebisu Town Citizens
dialogue.text: whose death should be laughed at.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is probably the smile fruits at work.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's some here, too. People that cannot but smile.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see you knew, my LORD... about the plan.

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: That's why you... NO! Lord Yasuieie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oniga- Shima

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's a sick one,

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: that bloody Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WORO RORO RO...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Inuarashi. Kinemon. Do...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Do you know of the smile fruit?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose we should have told you about it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The smiles of the people of ebisu town

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: are but masks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Masks

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: that can never be removed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A few years ago,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido and Crochi,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: began to trade weapons made in this country

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For a certain sort of artificially made, synthetic fruits.

dialogue.speaker: Ebisu Town Citizens
dialogue.text: smiles.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A terrifying fruit that, if eaten, would make one hated by the sea and unable to swim.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet, in return, it grants one the feral power of a beast.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Synthetic devil fruits, right? We just destroyed the factory makin' those.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes. I heard from kin.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido aimed to use these fruits

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to bolster the ranks of his followers with monsters.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To create the most fearsome pirate crew in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, the thing is, these fruits come with a catch.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
